name: zenmarket
description: ZenMarket — Sri Lanka's premium e-commerce platform

scripts.dev:node: node -e "require('http').createServer((req,res) => { require('fs').readFile('.' + req.url.replace(/\?.*/,'') + (req.url.endsWith('/') ? 'index.html' : ''), (e,d) => e ? (res.writeHead(404), res.end('Not found')) : (res.writeHead(200), res.end(d))); }).listen(3000, () => console.log('http://localhost:3000'))"
scripts.lint: echo 'No linter configured — add eslint if needed'
scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/health | node -e "process.stdin.resume(); let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d)))"

author: ZenMarket
